perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with reddish-purple hair in a black jacket with bird embroidery talks excitedly to the camera in a park, flanked by a blonde man and a woman. (2) Close-up shots show a silver product box labeled 'GREEN GOLD' and small round capsules held in a hand. (3) The group is shown outdoors eating large pieces of fried chicken, with the main character gesturing towards the camera. (4) The narrator displays different supplement boxes, including a gold-trimmed 'GREEN GOLD' box, while pointing at functional features. (5) High-detail close-up of a yellow tablet with a 'G' logo and a scientific graphic showing formula concentration. (6) The video concludes with the three individuals posing together in the park, waving and pointing toward the screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male vocals speaking Mandarin begin immediately, characterized by a fast-paced and persuasive tone. (2) An upbeat, rhythmic electronic background music track plays continuously with a steady tempo. (3) Sound effects of crunching and eating are layered over the speech during close-ups of food consumption. (4) Occasional brief interjections and laughter from other male and female voices are heard, though the primary narrator dominates. (5) The volume of the speech remains high and consistent, with the background music fading slightly at the very end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Hook Text: '炸雞路跑' and a discount code '嘎哥優惠碼GA95' appear at the start. (2) Decorative Feature Text: 'GREEN GOLD 葛花纖', '1天2顆', '促進循環', and '幫助消化' are shown as floating captions. (3) Promotional Hook: 'GREENGOLD 9週年祭', '全館最低5折起', and '不滿意可以全退' emphasize sales and guarantees. (4) Content Text: '高濃度 95% 黃金比例薑黃素' provides technical product specifications. (5) Functional Text: Consistent subtitles at the bottom translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product Feature Presentation -> Benefit Demonstration via Eating -> Sales Promotion Info -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (male), 1 male friend, 1 female friend
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male with reddish-purple dyed hair, wearing a white t-shirt under a black zip-up jacket featuring white bird/crane embroidery.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A public park environment with green trees, paved walkways, park benches, and some distant urban structures and parked vehicles.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> Feature Breakdown -> Promotional CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional vlog designed to market 'GREEN GOLD' health supplements. It uses the context of eating greasy fried chicken as a narrative hook to introduce weight management and digestive aid products (Kudzu Flower and Curcumin), leveraging a 9th-anniversary sale and a personal discount code to drive immediate sales.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products, verbal recommendation of benefits, discount code 'GA95' provided on screen, and mention of a 9th-anniversary sale.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed narration, '嘎哥' (Gaga) branding, variety-show style text graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Classic Taiwanese influencer marketing style focusing on high-energy delivery and direct product benefit claims tied to lifestyle habits (eating out).
